form.formComment: Last start a big 5 m win when quickly away, (Fr1) at this track (2:04.10) beating Down Ward Dog in NR up to 58 on April 2 at $3.80 at the bell was leading 1.94. The ace draw may see him competitive again.

form.formComment: 4th (Fr2) over 2125m at this track, at the bell was 7th-14.9 beaten 9 m by Major Art (2:34.00) in NR up to 80 on April 9 at $71. Before that was driven from back in the field when 10th (Fr5) over 1720m at this track beaten 25 m by Palatino (2:04.10) in NR up to 58 on April 2 at $41. Others make more appeal.

form.formComment: Recent efforts haven't been up to his best. Last start 9th (Fr3) over 2125m after showing early speed at this track was 5th-11.04 at the bell, beaten 15 m by Major Art (2:34.00) in NR up to 80 on April 9 at $9. The start before 8th (Fr5) over 1609m after being wide early at Newcastle was 3rd-4.5 at the bell, beaten 17 m by Jalaneel (1:52.70) in NR up to 90 on March 28 at $10. Better than last start and can improve sharply.

Contender.

form.formComment: Six-year-old entire who has plenty of ability. Unlucky last start 9th (Fr6) over 1609m after showing early pace at Menangle, beaten 15 m by Classic Mission (1:52.00) in NR up to 95 on April 11 at $21. Suited back in grade so expecting a much better run this time.
